selectionPolicy: Three reviewed public pages chosen to cover popup lure, redirect-CTA, and overlay-heavy playback shells with low enough noise for recurring popup-player smoke runs.

targets.name: Popup smoke 01 (xHamster popup-lure seed)
reproSteps: Load the page and allow the extension to detect the main player shell.
Trigger the popup-player entry path and confirm the page does not regress into popup or redirect traps.
Confirm the browser_judge snapshot still reports a playable page rather than an interstitial-only result.

source.rationale: Single-page public host with known popup and redirect lure patterns.

targets.name: Popup smoke 02 (EPORNER redirect-CTA seed)
reproSteps: Open the video page and wait for the extension's player detection to settle.
Exercise the popup-player flow and watch for redirect-style interruption instead of a stable player transfer.
Use the stored screenshot and snapshot to confirm the main player remained visible.

source.rationale: Lower-noise redirect-CTA style regression seed suitable for recurring smoke checks.

targets.name: Popup smoke 03 (Javboys overlay-heavy shell)
reproSteps: Open the article page and let the extension settle through iframe and overlay handling.
Verify popup-player can still be reached from the detected playable surface.
Check that the page remains a playback shell rather than collapsing into an anti-antiblock or redirect-trap state.

source.rationale: Overlay-heavy playback shell that exercises the anti-antiblock and iframe side of popup-player behavior.
